ab: Ci Kacaw han ko sanga’ayay a widang ako, O wawa no ’Amis cingra.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Kacaw，他也是阿美族的小孩。
en: My good friend's name is Kacaw, and he is also an Amis child.

ab: Malacafay kami a mitakeci i Fanaw a niyaro’.
ch: 我們一起在池上部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Tafalong tribe.

ab: Mararid kami malacafay mitengil to pakongko no malitengay, saheto mafana’ay kami a misano’Amsi.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說阿美語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Amis proficiently.

ab: ’Akawang a maso^:so kako, poener a mangiliw ci Kacaw.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Kacaw很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Kacaw is short and thin.

ab: Tariktikay ci Kacaw, o kaolaolahan no ’alomanay cingra.
ch: Kacaw很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Kacaw is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
